message:
🌱 Add flagger: Keptn Metrics Provider mission (#743)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flagger-1627-keptn-metrics-provider",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flagger: Keptn Metrics Provider",
+    "description": "Keptn Metrics Provider. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current flagger deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your flagger version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger\nhelm list -n flagger 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working flagger installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flagger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flagger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger\nkubectl get configmap -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flagger\n```\n## Describe the feature\n\nI would like to suggest the addition of a [Keptn](https://keptn.sh) metrics provider to the list of already implemented providers."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Keptn Metrics Provider",
+        "description": "Hi  I'm happy to have this integration in Flagger. I see that the API version is at `v1beta1`, would you be able to help maintain the integration in Flagger going forward?\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade flagger to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade flagger:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade flagger flagger/flagger --namespace flagger\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flagger\nhelm list -n flagger\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger\nkubectl get events -n flagger --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Keptn Metrics Provider\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi  I'm happy to have this integration in Flagger. I see that the API version is at `v1beta1`, would you be able to help maintain the integration in Flagger going forward?",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "flagger",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "flagger"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Clusterrole"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flagger/issues/1627",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flagger"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 2,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with flagger installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
